page: UpCloud CLOUDNATIVE-80xCPU-512GB is a memory-optimized and general-purpose cloud server powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 80 vCPUs and 80 physical cores, utilizing AMD EPYC 9354 processors running at a base clock speed of 2.0 GHz. The system is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, providing a resource density of 6.4 GB per core. No local storage or GPUs are bundled with this instance, and it includes zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

In benchmark evaluations, the server demonstrates top-tier performance in multi-core processing and memory bandwidth. The stress-ng multi-core CPU test and bzip3 multi-threaded decompression both rank in the top 10% of tested systems. Memory read-only bandwidth reaches 6934.47 GB/sec for small cached blocks and 402.44 GB/sec for large uncached blocks, while write bandwidth is recorded at 218.77 GB/sec. Additionally, the instance excels in database operations, achieving 143.15 million operations per second in Redis SET benchmarks.

The server's hardware profile is highly cost-efficient for workloads requiring dense memory and high parallel processing capabilities without the added expense of local storage or dedicated GPUs. However, single-threaded performance and certain LLM text generation tasks represent relative tradeoffs, with medium model text generation performing in the bottom 25%. This configuration is highly suitable for large-scale database hosting, software compilation, ray tracing, and high-throughput web serving.
description: UpCloud CLOUDNATIVE-80xCPU-512GB is a memory-optimized cloud server featuring 80 vCPUs and 80 physical AMD EPYC 9354 cores on an x86_64 architecture. Operating under KVM, it provides 512.0 GB of RAM with no bundled local storage or GPUs. Benchmarks show top-tier multi-core CPU performance, high memory bandwidth, and strong database execution, though single-threaded tasks and LLM text generation show moderate results. It is suited for database operations, software compilation, and high-throughput web serving.
og_description: UpCloud CLOUDNATIVE-80xCPU-512GB is a KVM-based server with 80 AMD EPYC cores and 512 GB RAM. It delivers top-tier multi-core and memory bandwidth performance for databases and parallel workloads.
meta_description: UpCloud CLOUDNATIVE-80xCPU-512GB is a KVM server with 80 AMD EPYC cores and 512 GB RAM, optimized for high-throughput database and parallel workloads.
tagline: A high-core, memory-dense virtual server optimized for parallel computing, high-bandwidth memory operations, and large-scale database workloads.
bullet_points: 80 AMD EPYC 9354 physical cores on x86_64 KVM architecture
512 GB of RAM providing 6.4 GB per core without local storage
Top-tier multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth benchmark results
Excellent performance for Redis database operations and software compilation
Suited for memory-intensive parallel processing and web serving
